episode_name: Pre-Oslo First Intifada main phase in the Occupied Territories
geographic_scope: Occupied Territories (West Bank and Gaza Strip)
theater_description: Theater-wide pre-Oslo uprising phase as tabulated by B'Tselem.
geometry_method_note: Bounded to the Occupied Territories only, matching B'Tselem's table and excluding deaths inside Israel from the core episode row.
military_area_note: Israeli security-force deaths by Palestinians inside the Occupied Territories are retained separately from civilian deaths.
civilian_area_note: Palestinian deaths in the Occupied Territories are not forced into civilian or combatant bins when the source does not do so.
split_reason: Retained because B'Tselem provides the cleanest pre/post-Oslo boundary and class-coded Israeli victim data, making it a stronger anchor than annual rows.
quality_note: Strong death tabulation; weak exposure denominator and incomplete Palestinian status split.

theater_description: Single-day massacre-like subepisode within the First Intifada.
geometry_method_note: Bounded to the Temple Mount / Al-Aqsa compound and immediate clash area.
military_area_note: Israeli police and civilians appear as injured parties in the open source, but no clean military death total is present.
civilian_area_note: Palestinian dead are treated as civilians/worshippers in the retained estimate.
split_reason: Retained as a narrow, highly recognizable subepisode rather than another annual administrative slice.
quality_note: Strongly bounded event identity, but denominator support is absent.
